title: amaranthus × hungaricus
intro: Amaranthus × hungaricus, also known as Hungarian clover or love-lies-bleeding, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Amaranthus × hungaricus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
